title: openclaw/openclaw
content: Your own personal AI assistant. Any OS. Any Platform. The lobster way. 🦞

highlights: Your own personal AI assistant.
Any OS. Any Platform.
The lobster way. 🦞

title: obra/superpowers

title: affaan-m/ECC
content: The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.
summary: 一个针对Claude Code、Codex、Opencode、Cursor等AI编码代理的性能优化系统，涵盖技能、本能、记忆、安全及研究优先的开发方法。
highlights: Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development
For Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond
The agent harness performance optimization system

title: n8n-io/n8n
content: Fair-code workflow automation platform with native AI capabilities. Combine visual building with custom code, self-host or cloud, 400+ integrations.

highlights: Fair-code workflow automation platform with native AI capabilities
Combine visual building with custom code
self-host or cloud

title: How Deutsche Telekom is rewiring telecommunications with AI

title: GPT-5.6 is now the preferred model in Microsoft 365 Copilot
content: Learn how GPT-5.6 powers Microsoft 365 Copilot with stronger AI capabilities across Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Chat, and Cowork for faster, higher-quality work.
summary: GPT-5.6 成为 Microsoft 365 Copilot 的首选模型，增强了 Word、Excel、PowerPoint、Chat 和 Cowork 等应用的 AI 能力，以提升工作速度和质量。
highlights: GPT-5.6 is now the preferred model in Microsoft 365 Copilot
stronger AI capabilities across Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Chat, and Cowork
faster, higher-quality work

title: Profiling in PyTorch (Part 3): Attention is all you profile
summary: 本文是PyTorch性能分析系列第三部分，聚焦于注意力机制的性能分析，通过实际案例展示如何使用PyTorch Profiler识别和优化注意力层中的瓶颈，并验证了性能分析在模型优化中的关键作用。
highlights: Attention is all you profile — 强调注意力机制在性能分析中的核心地位
通过PyTorch Profiler定位注意力层计算瓶颈
实际案例展示性能分析驱动的优化方法

title: Data for Agents
summary: 本文介绍了NVIDIA为AI代理开发提供的开放数据资源，包括数据集、工具和最佳实践，旨在加速智能代理的构建与部署。
highlights: NVIDIA发布了用于AI代理的开放数据资源。
资源包括数据集、工具和最佳实践。
旨在加速智能代理的构建与部署。
